CustomField.description: Comma-delimited category codes that threw exceptions during scanning (e.g. AA,GU). UI shows warning banner if non-empty. Category codes must never contain commas - comma is the delimiter.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated category codes (e.g. AA, GU) for categories that threw an exception during scanning. Findings for these categories may be missing from this run.
CustomField.label: Failed Categories
